ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptographic key */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of the cryptographic key */,
  "cryptoperiod" TEXT /* Duration for which the key is valid */,
  "generation_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the key */,
  "rng_used" TEXT /* Random Number Generator used for key generation */,
  "key_generation_spec" TEXT /* Specification for key generation */,
  "disclosure_protection" TEXT /* Details on how key confidentiality is maintained */,
  "modification_protection" TEXT /* Details on modification protections for the key */,
  "key_size" INTEGER /* Size of the key */,
  "key_format" TEXT /* Format of the key */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the key was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this metadata */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the metadata is derived */,
  "vetting_process" TEXT /* How the metadata was vetted for accuracy */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of metadata (e.g., security, compliance, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_metadata_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_establishment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key establishment method */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this method */,
  "transport_scheme" TEXT /* Transport scheme used if applicable */,
  "agreement_scheme" TEXT /* Key agreement scheme used if applicable */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of any protocol used for key establishment */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the key establishment method */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_establishment_methods_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key used by the application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., allowed, disallowed) */,
  "application_category" TEXT /* Category of application (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_applications_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_assurances" (
  "assurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assurance entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this assurance */,
  "assurance_type" TEXT /* Type of the assurance (e.g., Symmetric, Asymmetric) */,
  "assurance_details" TEXT /* Details about the assurance provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_assurances_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Active, Revoked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the state means */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_states_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this transition */,
  "from_state" TEXT /* The state the key is transitioning from */,
  "to_state" TEXT /* The state the key is transitioning to */,
  "transition_date" TEXT /* Date of the state transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_transitions_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, auditor, security officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the key was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance requirement */,
  "requirement_text" TEXT /* Text describing the compliance requirement */,
  "related_standard" TEXT /* Standard or regulation that the requirement is related to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_usage_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key associated with this policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., rotation, revocation) */,
  "policy_details" TEXT /* Details about the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_usage_policies_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance requirement being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_results" TEXT /* Results of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audit_trails_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
